title: X(g) / Y(g) segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geoms (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, g GEOMETRY NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE nodes (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, g GEOMETRY DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO geoms (id, g) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326)), (2, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 2)', 4326));
INSERT INTO nodes (id, g) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(3 3)', 4326));
SELECT ST_X(g) FROM geoms UNION SELECT ST_Y(g) FROM nodes WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting X(g) or Y(g) from geometry tables
